title: Kitchen knife
description: You have a kitchen knife with some code-based attacks, but it's very weak. It can defeat some relatively weak mod creatures.(chinese)(Beginner Creation)(A kitchen knife that doesn't look like a kitchen knife)
body:
### **Artifact: “Cleaver” - The Primal Anomaly**

**Overview:**
Forged from concepts rather than matter, the **Cleaver** is an anomalous artifact that operates on a meta-level, manipulating the fundamental rules of the world. It appears not as a grand sword, but as a simple, unnaturally flawless kitchen cleaver, its blade reflecting not light, but a silent void. This unassuming form belies its function as a universal editor, capable of issuing administrative commands to reality itself.

**Core Abilities:**

1.  **Entity Purge Protocol:**
    Upon activation, the Cleaver does not "cut" in a physical sense. Instead, it executes a `world.removeEntities()` command within its operational frame. All non-player entities (mobs, dropped items, experience orbs, projectiles, and vehicles) in a designated area are instantly and silently derezzed from existence. They leave no drops, make no death sounds, and simply cease to be, as if their code was cleanly deleted. This makes it the ultimate tool for clearing out massive invasions, cleaning complex Redstone contraptions, or resetting farm areas without a trace.

2.  **Stasis Trigger:**
    This ability allows the wielder to place a single, invisible "pause point" or trigger in the world. When activated again, the Cleaver sends a localized `tick.freeze` command. Within a 50x50 block area centered on the trigger, all game processes pause: mobs freeze in mid-air, Redstone signals stop propagating, pistons halt, and crop growth ceases. Time remains paused for the wielder, allowing for precise observation, tactical repositioning, or emergency planning. Deactivating the ability resumes time seamlessly. This is not a slow effect, but a true, selective pause of game ticks.

3.  **Oblivion Strike (50x50 AOE):**
    The Cleaver's primary offensive manifestation. When swung with intent, it interfaces with the world's coordinate grid. Every entity (excluding players and world-essential entities like the Ender Dragon) within a **50 block by 50 block square area** centered on the point of impact is simultaneously targeted. There is no projectile or animation—just a single, server-wide instant of calculated destruction. Each valid entity within that massive zone takes catastrophic, typeless damage, sufficient to obliterate even the most powerful bosses in a single, synchronized flash. The visual effect is a brief, screen-wide chromatic aberration followed by profound silence, as the entire battlefield is cleared at once.

**Technical Lore & Acquisition:**
The Cleaver is not craftable through any in-game recipe. It is said to be the manifested will of a player who achieved complete command line access, a "joke weapon" turned reality. Its code is woven directly into the save file, and whispers among modders suggest it can only be obtained by defeating a hidden boss in a dimension made of corrupted chunks, or by directly editing one's creative inventory through external means. It is the ultimate tool of convenience and absolute control, bending the very rules of *Minecraft* to its wielder's will, making even the famed "Sword of the Cosmos" seem like a mere blunt instrument in comparison.
